title: Standard Specification for Additive Manufacturing Titanium-6 Aluminum-4 Vanadium ELI (Extra Low Interstitial) with Powder Bed Fusion

committee.name: Additive Manufacturing Technologies
committee.scope: Promotion of knowledge, stimulation of research, and development of standards for additive manufacturing technologies.

scope: This specification covers additively manufactured titanium-6 aluminum-4 vanadium ELI (Extra Low Interstitial) components produced via powder bed fusion processes, intended for use in surgical implants and aerospace applications.

referencedStandards.title: Standard Specification for Additive Manufacturing Titanium-6 Aluminum-4 Vanadium with Powder Bed Fusion
